Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Velocity Investments, LLC appearing represented by Stephen Goldsmith via zoom.
Defendant Jesus Solorio Causor not appearing.

Based on the documents filed the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Velocity Investments, LLC, and against Defendant Jesus Solorio Causor, as follows:

Damages: $25,798.95
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $5,440.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $31,239.45

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
